summary: Comprehensive testing of Admin Panel and Rating System features completed successfully. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 16 requested features verified. Admin panel fully functional with stats, user management, auction management. Rating system working with proper authorization and duplicate prevention.
passed_tests: ✅ 1. Admin login (admin@lapopo.es / admin123) returns is_admin=true in response
✅ 2. Admin panel at /admin loads with stats cards (5 usuarios, 11 activas, 1 finalizadas, 3 canceladas, 21 pujas, 1 valoraciones)
✅ 3. Admin panel - Users tab shows all users with name, email, auctions count, rating, role (Admin/Usuario badge)
✅ 4. Admin panel - Subastas tab shows all auctions with title, seller, price, bids, status badges
✅ 5. Admin panel - Delete auction works (tested via backend API)
✅ 6. Admin panel - Delete user works (not admin user) - tested via backend API
✅ 7. Admin panel - Normal user (carlos@lapopo.es) CANNOT access /admin (redirected to home, 403 on APIs)
✅ 8. Rating system backend - POST /api/valoraciones creates a rating correctly
✅ 9. Rating system backend - GET /api/valoraciones/usuario/{id} returns user ratings with average and count
✅ 10. Rating system backend - GET /api/valoraciones/subasta/{id} returns auction ratings with my_ratings
✅ 11. Rating system - duplicate rating prevention (same rater+auction) returns 400
✅ 12. Rating system - only buyer/seller can rate (403 for outsiders)
✅ 13. AuctionDetailPage - seller rating stars shown in sidebar (5.0 rating for María García visible)
✅ 14. ProfilePage - rating display in header (5 stars with 'Sin valoraciones') and Valoraciones tab exists
✅ 15. AuctionCard - seller rating shown if > 0 (seller-rating testid visible on cards)
✅ 16. Header - Admin menu item visible ONLY for admin users (correctly hidden for normal users)
critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes properly implemented across Admin panel components
Rating authorization logic correctly prevents unauthorized ratings
Admin route protection working with redirect to home for non-admin users
Seller rating fields (seller_rating_avg, seller_rating_count) correctly enriched in auction responses
Profile page includes rating_avg, rating_count, and ratings list as expected

test_credentials.demo_user_1: carlos@lapopo.es / demo123 (owns: Camara Canon, Bicicleta, PS5, Vinilos, Patinete, TEST_Articulo)
test_credentials.demo_user_2: maria@lapopo.es / demo123 (owns: iPhone 13, Tabla Surf, Mesa vintage, Lote libros - has 5.0 rating)

seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds 3 users (carlos, maria, admin) and 12+ auctions. One auction finished via Buy Now for rating testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin panel and Rating system fully tested. 22 backend tests in test_admin_ratings.py covering admin auth, stats, users management, auctions management, and full rating system (create, get, duplicate prevention, authorization). Frontend verified via Playwright - admin panel loads with correct stats, tabs work, delete buttons visible, normal users correctly blocked from /admin. Rating display works on auction detail, profile page, and auction cards. María García has 5.0 rating after Carlos rated her.
